paragraph: Glad ForceFlex Tall Drawstring Trash Bags are designed with stretchable strength to handle the heaviest loads without tearing. The ForceFlex technology delivers extra toughness as it flexes and expands around sharp edges and heavy loads without ripping. Featuring two layers of extra leak protection and RipGuard technology, these trash bags guard against punctures and tears, and trap liquids in the bag so you can put your most demanding trash up for the challenge. Let the stretchable strength of Glad handle the toughest messes your business encounters and then some. The Grips The Can Drawstring ensures that the bag stays in place, until you are ready to take it out. Ideal for offices, daycares, schools, hotels, restaurants and more. CloroxPro, where clean means everything.
bullets: GLAD DRAWSTRING TRASH BAGS: Tackle your demanding business needs with versatile, unscented Glad ForceFlex Tall Drawstring Trash Bags, designed with stretchable strength; packaging may vary
RIPGUARD PROTECTION: Designed with double side seams and a reinforced bottom to trap liquids and prevent leaks, these trash bags are strong enough to handle the heaviest load
FORCEFLEX TECHNOLOGY: The patented dual layer protection is designed to give extra flex as it expands around sharp edges and heavy loads while resisting punctures, rips and tears
2 LAYERS EXTRA LEAK PROTECTION: These stretchable garbage bags are equipped with two layers so you never have to think twice about messy trash leaks
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: Ideal for use in schools, daycare centers, restaurants, hotels and other commercial facilities; CloroxPro, where clean means everything

GRIPS-THE-CAN DRAWSTRING: The durable 3-ply drawstring design grips the can so the garbage bag stays in place, and makes it easy to close and easy to carry out the trash, with no fear of leaks or tears
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: These Tall Kitchen Trash Bags from Glad® are ideal for use in schools, daycare centers, restaurants, hotels and other commercial facilities
headliner: Glad ForceFlex Tall Drawstring Trash bags are designed with stretchable strength to handle the heaviest loads without leaks, rips or tears.
expandedDescr:
Usage Directions: Lift the trash bag from the container by pulling the drawstrings on either side of the bag. Knot the drawstrings for added security. Carry the bag by the drawstring and toss into garbage.

Ingredients: Not applicable.

Caution Statement: Plastic bags can be dangerous. To avoid danger of suffocation, keep all plastic bags away from babies and children. DO NOT USE FOR FOOD STORAGE.

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: Feel your music more. With the Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones, you get breakthrough spatial audio for more natural-sounding music, no matter the source.
bullets: Quiet and Aware Modes
Dynamic Mic Mixing for Clear Calls
Bluetooth 5.3 Connectivity, Up to 30'
Supports SimpleSync and Bose Music App
Immersive, Spatial Audio Mode
Passive and Active Noise Cancellation
IPX4-Rated Water and Sweat Resistance
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling In-Ear Earbuds
expandedDescr: Feel your music more. With the Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones, you get breakthrough spatial audio for more natural-sounding music, no matter the source. These wireless earbuds use immersive sound to bring the music from inside your head – right in front of you. And for the noises you don’t want to hear, the QC Ultra Earbuds offer world-class noise cancelation. The CustomTune technology analyzes your ear’s shape and adapts the sound and noise cancelling to it. The innovation doesn’t just stop at the premium sound, the design of these in-ear headphones is a one-of-a-kind experience too. You get nine combinations of eartip and stability band sizes to choose from. And up to six hours of play time (up to 4 hours with Immersive Audio)* keeps your favorite music playing as long as you want. The included case holds up to three additional charges. Connect to your devices with advanced Bluetooth 5.3 and keep track of what you have paired in the Bose Music app. It also walks you through setup, lets you customize a shortcut, and access Adjustable EQ settings.

dummyKeySTORE.skuDescription: Bose QuietComfort Wireless Noise Canceling Earbuds Black 8828260010

paragraph: The j5create USB Type-C 100W synchronization and charging cable is a high-speed cable that is great for charging USB Type-C devices. The cable features a reversible USB Type-C connector on each side. The power cable supports Power Delivery and data transfer between smartphones, tablets, and laptops. It supports speeds up to 480Mbps and an output of 5A. With a double-braided polyester cover, the exterior is abrasion-resistant, reducing fraying and increasing the life span.
bullets: High-speed cable great for charging USB Type-C devices
Cable length is 5.9'
Contains two USB Type-C male connectors
USB Type-C connector is protected by a metal casing and dual-layer molding to prevent damage from bending and twisting; cable jacket is made of PVC with plastic enclosure
Delivers transfer speeds up to 480Mbps
Supports up to 20V/5A 100W charging for all USB Type-C devices, including phones, tablets, and laptops
Supports Power Delivery and Qualcomm quick charge
Built-in E-marker chip ensures safe and stable 100W fast charging
This cable is not intended for displays
Shield-braid and metalized mylar shielding protects the cable from external electromagnetic interference
Comes in black with orange accents
1-year manufacturer limited warranty
⚠ WARNING: Cancer and Reproductive Harm - www.P65Warnings.ca.gov

paragraph: The j5create USB Type-C 100W synchronization and charging cable is a high-speed cable that is great for charging USB Type-C devices. The cable features a reversible USB Type-C connector on each side. The power cable supports Power Delivery and data transfer between smartphones, tablets, and laptops. It supports speeds up to 480Mbps and an output of 5A. With a double-braided polyester cover, the exterior is abrasion-resistant, reducing fraying and increasing the life span.
bullets: High-speed cable great for charging USB Type-C devices
Cable length is 5.9'
Contains two USB Type-C male connectors
USB Type-C connector is protected by a metal casing and dual-layer molding to prevent damage from bending and twisting; cable jacket is made of PVC with plastic enclosure
Delivers transfer speeds up to 480Mbps
Supports up to 20V/5A 100W charging for all USB Type-C devices, including phones, tablets, and laptops
Supports Power Delivery and Qualcomm quick charge
Built-in E-marker chip ensures safe and stable 100W fast charging
This cable is not intended for displays
Shield-braid and metalized mylar shielding protects the cable from external electromagnetic interference
Comes in black with orange accents
1-year manufacturer limited warranty
⚠ WARNING: Cancer and Reproductive Harm - www.P65Warnings.ca.gov

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: Feel your music more. With the Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones, you get breakthrough spatial audio for more natural-sounding music, no matter the source.
bullets: Quiet and Aware Modes
Dynamic Mic Mixing for Clear Calls
Bluetooth 5.3 Connectivity, Up to 30'
Supports SimpleSync and Bose Music App
Immersive, Spatial Audio Mode
Passive and Active Noise Cancellation
IPX4-Rated Water and Sweat Resistance
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling In-Ear Earbuds
expandedDescr: Feel your music more. With the Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones, you get breakthrough spatial audio for more natural-sounding music, no matter the source. These wireless earbuds use immersive sound to bring the music from inside your head – right in front of you. And for the noises you don’t want to hear, the QC Ultra Earbuds offer world-class noise cancelation. The CustomTune technology analyzes your ear’s shape and adapts the sound and noise cancelling to it. The innovation doesn’t just stop at the premium sound, the design of these in-ear headphones is a one-of-a-kind experience too. You get nine combinations of eartip and stability band sizes to choose from. And up to six hours of play time (up to 4 hours with Immersive Audio)* keeps your favorite music playing as long as you want. The included case holds up to three additional charges. Connect to your devices with advanced Bluetooth 5.3 and keep track of what you have paired in the Bose Music app. It also walks you through setup, lets you customize a shortcut, and access Adjustable EQ settings.

dummyKey.skuDescription: Bose QuietComfort Wireless Noise Canceling Earbuds Black 8828260010

paragraph: Glad ForceFlex Tall Drawstring Trash Bags are designed with stretchable strength to handle the heaviest loads without tearing. The ForceFlex technology delivers extra toughness as it flexes and expands around sharp edges and heavy loads without ripping. Featuring two layers of extra leak protection and RipGuard technology, these trash bags guard against punctures and tears, and trap liquids in the bag so you can put your most demanding trash up for the challenge. Let the stretchable strength of Glad handle the toughest messes your business encounters and then some. The Grips The Can Drawstring ensures that the bag stays in place, until you are ready to take it out. Ideal for offices, daycares, schools, hotels, restaurants and more. CloroxPro, where clean means everything.
bullets: GLAD DRAWSTRING TRASH BAGS: Tackle your demanding business needs with versatile, unscented Glad ForceFlex Tall Drawstring Trash Bags, designed with stretchable strength; packaging may vary
RIPGUARD PROTECTION: Designed with double side seams and a reinforced bottom to trap liquids and prevent leaks, these trash bags are strong enough to handle the heaviest load
FORCEFLEX TECHNOLOGY: The patented dual layer protection is designed to give extra flex as it expands around sharp edges and heavy loads while resisting punctures, rips and tears
2 LAYERS EXTRA LEAK PROTECTION: These stretchable garbage bags are equipped with two layers so you never have to think twice about messy trash leaks
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: Ideal for use in schools, daycare centers, restaurants, hotels and other commercial facilities; CloroxPro, where clean means everything

GRIPS-THE-CAN DRAWSTRING: The durable 3-ply drawstring design grips the can so the garbage bag stays in place, and makes it easy to close and easy to carry out the trash, with no fear of leaks or tears
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: These Tall Kitchen Trash Bags from Glad® are ideal for use in schools, daycare centers, restaurants, hotels and other commercial facilities
headliner: Glad ForceFlex Tall Drawstring Trash bags are designed with stretchable strength to handle the heaviest loads without leaks, rips or tears.
expandedDescr:
Usage Directions: Lift the trash bag from the container by pulling the drawstrings on either side of the bag. Knot the drawstrings for added security. Carry the bag by the drawstring and toss into garbage.

Ingredients: Not applicable.

Caution Statement: Plastic bags can be dangerous. To avoid danger of suffocation, keep all plastic bags away from babies and children. DO NOT USE FOR FOOD STORAGE.
